Brand Identity 2026

Empowering
Communities
Through Water.

A complete identity system built on the depth of water, the precision of technology, and the permanence of community.

Setting New Standards in Water Re-Use
LIVWater · 2026
Our Story

Born from a belief that water
access is a fundamental right.

LIVWater was founded to bridge the gap between centralised water infrastructure and the communities and developments that need it most — delivering Water-as-a-Service with full lifecycle responsibility, from design through operation.

LIV
What We Stand For

The four pillars of the LIVWater brand.

💧
Water

Access, purity and independence. Treatment, supply and lifecycle management.

⚡
Technology

Smart infrastructure, real-time monitoring, data-driven operational intelligence.

🌐
Community

People, empowerment and wellbeing at the centre of every water solution we build.

♻️
Sustainability

Water stewardship and environmental responsibility embedded in how we operate.

Brand Vision

A catalyst for
sustainable change.

We aim to sustain life while nourishing the earth — building water infrastructure that communities depend on today and that the planet can support tomorrow.

Logo System

One mark. Four variations.

Vertical — Dark
Horizontal — Light
Icon Only
Vertical — Standard
Colour Palette

Deep blues for authority. Accent blue for energy. White for clarity.

#010B1C Primary Deep
#133D75 Brand Navy
#1AA3E8 Accent Blue

Typography

Helvetica Now · Montserrat

Clean, modern, technically credible. No serifs. No decoration.

Primary — Helvetica Now
Aa
Water is Life.
Clean lines, geometric balance. Used across all primary brand touchpoints — headlines, decks, collateral, signage.
Bold · Medium · Regular · Light
ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ
abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz 0123456789
Secondary — Montserrat
Aa
Setting new standards.
Web-safe, open-source fallback. Used on digital platforms, partner contexts, and third-party co-branded assets.
SemiBold · Medium · Regular · Light
ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ
abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz 0123456789
Imagery System

Two modes. One brand.

Mode A
Brand Atmosphere

Cinematic, dark, water-led. Whale shark motif. Hero sections, brand identity, social tiles, deck covers.

Mode B
Operational Reality

Real infrastructure, real environments. Capability decks, investor materials, project case studies.

Sub-Brand Architecture

One platform. Four services.

Each sub-brand shares the master LIVWater identity — no separate icons, consistent type treatment, unified palette.

LIVSupply Water Supply

Decentralised potable water supply. Design, build, operate, and maintain at scale.

LIVWaste Wastewater Treatment

On-site wastewater management with full regulatory compliance and environmental stewardship.

LIVReuse Water Recycling

Treated water reuse for non-potable applications — irrigation, industrial, and amenity use.

LIVSmart Smart Monitoring

Real-time IoT monitoring, smart metering, and data intelligence across the full water network.

Brand in Practice
100%

Lifecycle responsibility — from design and construction through to long-term operation.

Premium, technically credible, commercially intelligent — across every touchpoint.
No greenwashing. No generic sustainability language. Infrastructure facts speak for themselves.
Dark surfaces for brand and investor contexts. Light for dense content and documentation.
Restraint and negative space are not wasted space — they signal confidence and precision.
The whale shark is a singular identity anchor — powerful because it's used with restraint.
Water is Life

The brand that
moves like water.

Coherent across every surface. Credible at every scale. Built to endure — like the infrastructure it represents.
